$comment: Pyxis OpenPBR Shader Playground fixture — SIGGRAPH 2024 OpenPBR coverage scene (47 .usd*, ~50 materials, ~57 MB geometry). Companion to m8_world_lobby for §11 OpenPBR validation: every material is authored via the OpenPBR shader graph the renderer's closesthit is canonicalised on. Standalone: provides §34 KPI dims (1920x1080), pinned seed for repeatability, FIF=3 for §33.7 byte-equal contract. Scene path is supplied separately via --scene so the fixture is reusable when a future drop of the Playground reshapes its directory layout.
